meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve 'Can't Finish Projects'
content.seo_description: Break the cycle of unfinished projects. Learn how to build passive income engines using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led founder tutorial.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing features and start building assets. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for automated iteration, you can ship micro-SaaS products that generate passive revenue. Focus on solving one specific pain point, automate the delivery, and move to the next. Speed to market is your competitive edge.
content.intro:
You sit at your desk at 2 AM, surrounded by a digital graveyard of half-baked repos and abandoned landing pages. The 'can't finish projects' syndrome isn't a lack of talent—it's a lack of a system. You are caught in the trap of perfectionism, tinkering with code that never sees a customer's credit card.

But the game changes when you shift from 'building software' to 'engineering passive income.' By treating your development stack as a production line rather than a creative canvas, you transform unfinished experiments into automated revenue streams. It is time to stop being a coder and start being a founder who ships.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Micro-Problem
steps.description: Identify a small, recurring pain point in a niche market that people are already paying to solve. Focus on a single outcome.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following niche market and identify three high-intent problems that can be solved with a single-feature SaaS tool that requires minimal maintenance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research top 3 recurring pain points in the [niche] market and suggest a micro-SaaS solution for each.'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a lean, production-ready codebase that handles authentication and payments out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate for a Next.js SaaS app with Stripe integration and Supabase auth. Structure it for rapid deployment to Vercel.

steps.title: Automate Core Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Don't write boilerplate. Use Claude Code to implement the primary value-add function, ensuring it is clean and robust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer function that processes user input and returns the desired output based on the core problem identified in step 1.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement a server-side handler that processes user requests and returns the formatted result, including error handling.'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Hooks
steps.description: Embed Stripe logic early. If the user can't pay, you don't have a business; you have a hobby.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Stripe webhooks to handle subscription status and grant access to the core feature upon successful payment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Integrate Stripe webhook verification and update the user database record to reflect active subscription status.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Ship the MVP to a public URL. Use automated testing to ensure the flow is frictionless.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated test suite to verify the end-to-end flow from landing page to successful payment and feature delivery.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Deploy to Vercel and execute smoke tests for the sign-up and payment flow.'

pro_tips: Never build a feature unless you can charge for it immediately.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code into 'dead-simple' modules so you can reuse them in your next project.
Prioritize 'Time to First Dollar' over 'Time to Perfect UI'.
If a project takes more than 14 days to reach MVP, you are over-engineering it.
Always add a 'Kill Switch' in your code to easily decommission non-performing projects.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus entirely on distribution. Use the code you've built as a template, iterate based on actual user feedback, and then repeat the process for your next micro-SaaS.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in a private repository. Build, ship, and scale your passive income engine with the right tools. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
